candidate_llm_application: LLM ritual-prompt kata: rigid prompt-format compositions; deviations create topological defects in instruction-following; correct kata composes target output mode.

results.title: Instruction-Following / Prompt-Format Sensitivity: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on instruction-following / prompt-format sensitivity, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (instruction-following / prompt-format sensitivity); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (tea-ceremony-ritual terms vs LLM terms).
